text.title: Voice Basics — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step turn procedure: VAD-record → Whisper STT → GPT-4o reason → strip Markdown → streaming TTS → log latencies.

step.name: record-until-silence
step.action: webrtcvad aggressiveness 2 over 30ms frames. Accumulate while speech detected; stop after silence_ms of consecutive silence. Cap at max_duration_s.

step.name: stt-whisper
step.action: `client.audio.transcriptions.create(model="whisper-1", file=BytesIO(wav), language=language)`. Always pass language explicitly (rule r5).
step.decision-gate: if transcribed_text is empty / 1-2 chars → treat as silence, skip turn.

step.name: reason-llm
step.action: Append user message; call GPT-4o with `max_tokens=200`. Append assistant message to history; truncate to last 10 pairs (rule r4).

step.name: tts-streaming
step.action: Use `with_streaming_response.create(model="tts-1", voice=voice, input=text, response_format="pcm")`. Stream chunks to speaker / WebSocket / file.

step.name: log-latencies
step.action: Emit `{turn_id, transcribed_text, response_text, audio_path, latencies_ms, history_len, language, voice}` to the audit log. Warn if total > 1000ms; error if > 1500ms.
